info.title: intent-cli version
info.description: A CLI (command line interface) version of the Intent Architect Software Factory.

options.name: --error-logging-command
options.description: Command to use for logging an error. Some continuous integration environments watch output for "commands" for logging of errors. Will be automatically configured when the process is detected to be running on the following kinds of build servers:

options.name: --warning-logging-command
options.description: Command to use for logging a warning. Some continuous integration environments watch output for "commands" for logging of errors. Will be automatically configured when the process is detected to be running on the following kinds of build servers:

commands.name: ensure-no-outstanding-changes
commands.description: Runs the Software Factory and if there are any outstanding changes it prints out an error and exits with a non-zero return code.

options.name: --check-deviations
options.description: Whether to also check for unapproved deviations.

options.name: --application-id
options.description: The Id of the Intent Architect application. If unspecified then all applications found in the .isln will be run.

options.name: --attach-debugger
options.description: The Software Factory will pause at startup giving you chance to attach a .NET debugger.

options.name: --error-logging-command
options.description: Command to use for logging an error. Some continuous integration environments watch output for "commands" for logging of errors. Will be automatically configured when the process is detected to be running on the following kinds of build servers:

options.name: --warning-logging-command
options.description: Command to use for logging a warning. Some continuous integration environments watch output for "commands" for logging of errors. Will be automatically configured when the process is detected to be running on the following kinds of build servers:

arguments.name: USERNAME
arguments.description: Username for an active Intent Architect account.

arguments.name: PASSWORD
arguments.description: Password for the Intent Architect account.

arguments.name: ISLN-PATH
arguments.description: Path to the Intent Architect solution (.isln) file or folder containing a single .isln file.

commands.name: apply-pending-changes
commands.description: Runs the Software Factory and applies any outstanding changes.

options.name: --application-id
options.description: The Id of the Intent Architect application. If unspecified then all applications found in the .isln will be run.
